titleStmt.title: SII 22.256: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 256. (A.R. No. 256 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, PUDUPPĀḌI. VĒDANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE.

summary.p: The writing of this inscription seems to be of about the 17th century A.D. It records the re-consecration of god Vēdanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ in a new temple at Karaivaḻi Puduppāḍi in Kalavaippaṟṟu in his amara nāyakattanam in Paḍaivīḍurājya by the chief Ōbuḷa-Nāyaka son of Arasappuḍaiyar, who is also stated to have endowed lands for the rivival of worship therein, at the request of Aṇṇappaṅgār son of Ugappaṇaṅgaḷ. The gift is said to have been made by the donor on the banks of Pampāsāgara in the presence of God Viṭhalēśvara (at Vijayanagara). It is also stated that the original tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands which had not been properly utilised (by the donee) were now madeover along with a house site to a newly appointed priest by name Tiruvēṅkaṭa-Tātar (Dāsar) on an annual rental of 30 paṇam, by the ūravar of the village with the condition that he was also to look after the management of the tirunāmattukkāṇī lands newly endowed. Among the boundaries is mentioned an arhat temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Irattākṣi varuṣam tai mātam 10 5- tiyati śrīmatu paṇṭāram Aracappuṭaiyar makaṉār Opuḷanāyakkaṉ paṭaiviṭu Irācciyattil namakku Amara
nāyakkattaṉattukku cellum kalavaippaṟṟu karaivaḻi putuppāṭiyil perumāḷ vēta nārāyaṇap perumāḷukkut taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇi
kuṭuttapaṭi Ivvūr perumāḷ pra(ṟa)tiṣṭaiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvittu paṇṇavum Eḻuntaruḷum perumāḷaiyum kuṟaṭṭile Eḻunta
ruḷappaṇṇi tirunāḷum naṭattumpaṭikku pūṟuvam Ivvemperumāḷukku naṭantuvarum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭanilattāl pūcai puṉaṟkkāram naṭavātapaṭiyālum Ukap paṇaṅkaḷ Aṇṇappaṅkār
vantu namakkuc coṉṉapaṭiyāle makaracaṅkirāṉti puṇṇiyakālattile viṭṭalatevar caṉṉitiyile pampācākarattile Iraṇṇiyyotaka tārāpūṟuvam Āka
putuppāṭiyil nañcai puñcai nilattile viṭṭa nilattukku vakai kiḻpāṟk kellai cikaṇṭaṉ tāṅkal peruvāy Uṭppaṭa kukkūṇṭi yellaikku meṟkkum kukkūṇṭi
Eriyetirvāykku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai kalavaikku pokiṟa vaḻikku kiḻakkum cikaṇṭaṉ tāṅkal yetirvāyil tiṟappu tiruvāḻivaṭṭam takaḷivaṭṭattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟk
kellai Utāratevattarāyaṉkālukku teṟkkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa Oḻukiṉpaṭi nilamum kollai nilamum kaṟkuṭaikkuḻi Uṭpaṭa tāṅkalāka kaṭṭik ko
ḷḷavum Inta yellaiyil Ervaiāṉa Iṭattil tāṅkalil kaṭṭikkoḷḷa vum viṭṭa tirunāmattukkāṇikku ciṅkapperumāḷ veṅka
tiruveṅkaṭa(tā)tātar perumāḷai Eṟiyaruḷappaṇṇuvittu tiṅkaḷ tivasa mum naṭattik naṭattumpaṭikku tiruveṅkiṭatātarai kaṟpittapaṭiyāle taṉakku veṇṭum
kuṭiyum Eṟṟuvittu veṇṭum payirum payiṟceyvittukoḷḷavumkkaṭava ṉākavum Inta tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Āka viṭṭa ttukku com Āka kaṟpitta � 3 10 Ippaṇam muppatum varuṣam varuṣamtoṟum celu
ttakaṭavaṉākavum Āṟṟukkāl Eriṉirviḻukkāṭu kaṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavaṉākavum perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa maṉaikkellai kiḻpāṟkkellai teruvukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai Arukattevarkoyil vaṭak
kum ḷukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai puḷiyaṅkuṇṭil Ālaṉukku kiḻakku kuḷam Uḻpaṭa viṭṭa Aḷavukku Inta rāccuram paṇṇiṉa niṉṟayappaṭikku Ūravarum tāraivārttom Inta tiruṉāmattu
kāṇi tiruveṅkaṭatātare cantirātittavarai kāṇiyāka nokkikkoḷḷa kaṭavarākavum Inta kṣettirattukku yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkaikkaraiyil
kapilaippacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavaṉākavum Ivai Ūṟk kaṇakku cittirameḻipaṭṭaṉ maṇavaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
